zh.lifeSummary: 當John Keith Marischal of Scotland於1294年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，他的父親Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland25歲，母親Barbara Douglas14歲。他和Isabella de Soulis至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1324年在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Keith Marischal of Scotland于1294年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，他的父亲Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland25岁，母亲Barbara Douglas14岁。他和Isabella de Soulis至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1324年在英国苏格兰培爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Keith Marischal of Scotland was born in 1294, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland, was 25 and his mother, Barbara Douglas, was 14. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Isabella de Soulis. He died in 1324, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Keith Marischal of Scotland est né en 1294, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Barbara Douglas, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Isabella de Soulis. Il est décédé en 1324, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Keith Marischal of Scotland 1294 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland 25 und seine Mutter Barbara Douglas 14. Er hatte mit Isabella de Soulis mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1324 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Keith Marischal of Scotland è nato il nel 1294 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Barbara Douglas, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Isabella de Soulis. Morì nel 1324, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Keith Marischal of Scotlandが1294年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Robert Keith Marischal of Scotlandは25歳，母Barbara Douglasは14歳であった。彼はIsabella de Soulisとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1324年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Keith Marischal of Scotland(이)가 1294년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara Douglas(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Isabella de Soulis(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1324년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Keith Marischal of Scotland nasceu em 1294, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Douglas, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabella de Soulis. Ele faleceu em 1324, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Keith Marischal of Scotland родился в 1294 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Douglas, 14. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Isabella de Soulis. Он умер в 1324 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Keith Marischal of Scotland nació en 1294, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Barbara Douglas, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabella de Soulis. Murió en 1324, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
